faqs.question: What documents are required for Aryakul College of Pharmacy and Research application 2025?
faqs.answer: For Aryakul College of Pharmacy and Research application 2025, prepare your Class 10 and 12 marksheets and certificates. You also require a passport-size photo, Aadhar Card, and caste certificate (if necessary). Bachelor's degree documents are required only for higher-level admission. Upload them while completing the online form.

faqs.question: Does Aryakul College of Pharmacy and Research accept admission through CUET?
faqs.answer: No, Aryakul College of Pharmacy and Research does not provide admission through CUET. Admission is on the basis of marks in Class 12 Science only. No entrance exams such as CUET are required for admission. Shortlisting of candidates is on merit.

faqs.question: Can I take admission to Aryakul College of Pharmacy and Research with 60% in Class 12?
faqs.answer: Yes, you can apply to Aryakul College of Pharmacy and Research with 60% in Class 12 Science. As admission is merit-based, 60% qualifies you for both BPharma and DPharma. Final admission is based on competition and availability of seats. Make sure to apply early for a better opportunity.

faqs.question: How many marks are required in Class 12 to get admission in Aryakul College of Pharmacy and Research?
faqs.answer: Aryakul College of Pharmacy and Research has merit-based selection, so better marks enhance chances of admission. Although no specific cutoff is specified, Class 12 marks should be above 50% in Science. The better your score, the greater your chances of selection. Final selection is based on merit lists.

placements.overview:
Aryakul College of Pharmacy and Research, Sitapur established in the year 2019, is a renowned educational institution located in Sitapur, Uttar Pradesh. It provides a wide range of Degree and Diploma programs, including UG options. These programs are approved by the PCI and delivered to students in full-time mode, and are taught by experienced faculty members.

Students at the institute can choose from various courses such as B.Pharma, D.Pharma. These courses cover fields like Medicine and Health Sciences. The institute aims to provide quality education at an affordable fee, making it accessible to aspiring candidates with a seat count of 160. Students have the opportunity to gain valuable knowledge and skills in their chosen areas of interest. The fee for the courses offered by the institute ranges between INR 180,000. Additionally, the institute offers excellent infrastructure facilities to support students' learning experiences.

The Institute delivers the highest quality education through a well-developed curriculum and a dedicated & experienced faculty. This is complemented through various student support services like Auditorium, Labs.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: Best college for pharmacy.

review_content.Placements: 90% of students got placed from my batch. The average salary was 4 LPA. Recruiting companies were Sun Pharmacy, Tata 1 MG, Rinam, Alcem, Chandan Hospital in Lucknow, and Lucknow Hospital. 96% of students got internships from my batch of pharmacy. The top offer in the placement was 5 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: They provided labs, classrooms, and library. In hostel, Wi-Fi, fan, and collar were available. System was also available for breakfast, lunch, and dinner. Canteen facilities were available. They encourage short and extracurricular activities which help students build up.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: Good college and good laboratories.

review_content.Placements: Almost 85% of students got placed in this course. The highest salary package offered was 5 LPA. The lowest salary package offered was 2 LPA; the average salary package offered was 3.5 LPA. The top recruiting companies are Cipla Ltd., Dr. Reddy's Laboratories, and Aurobindo Pharma. 65% of students got internships at top companies. The top roles are drug inspector, scientific writer, quality control associate, and pathological scientist.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is very good. Our department has separate blocks for B. Pharma laboratories are well equipped, and many technical and financial books are available in the library. The food served in the hostel on a decent playing field is available for sports like cricket and volleyball.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Teachers are always helpful.

review_content.Placements: Mostly 30% of students are placed in my course. The maximum package offered in my course is approximately 2 LPA. The average package in this course is 1.50 LPA. The lowest package for this course is 1.20 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of my course is average. Wi-Fi is not available for the students, it is only faculty members. Labs are available in my department. Library is also available. Classrooms are good in my department. The food quality of the canteen is good.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Whenever we enter our college, we feel a very pleasant or positive vibe.

review_content.Placements: Approximately 85% of students get 100% placements. The college provides 100% placement support to all students in high-recruiting companies. Students basically get jobs in companies like Sun Pharma, Tata 1mg, Lupin, Cipla, etc. They are hiring most of our students.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college campus is full of positive vibes in a modern way of generation. Our college has Wi-Fi, separate labs, classrooms, a library, and highly modified equipment in our laboratory to do all experiments. The mess is fully hygienic. It provides good medical facilities 24x7. All sports are held in our college during the annual sports day.

reviews_list.review_title: Our college has good placement.

review_content.Placements: Good placements are available. Around 3.5 to 4 LPA salary packages are offered. review_content.Infrastructure: Average facilities are available for infrastructure and hostel facilities. Classrooms are not that big. Laboratory has good facilities to perform the practicals. Wi-Fi is quite good. Library is small but has many reference books and textbooks to refer to.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied with the college because of good faculty, placements, and value for money.

Torrent Pharmaceuticals, Cadila, Zydus, Sun Pharma, Intas, Torrent research center, Zydus research center, Indigene, GlaxoSmithKline, etc., visit our campus for placements. About 90% of students got internships from companies such as Zydus, Torrent, Cadila, Intas, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college has good infrastructure and facilities. It includes Wi-Fi, labs, library, computer lab, classroom, hall, etc. It has good facilities in the hostel and the quality of food is very good. The college has medicinal facilities too. There is an indoor game area and a sports area which are good facilities for indoor and outdoor games.

overview_faqs.question: Is K.B. Institute of Pharmaceutical Education and Research a well-regarded college or institution?
overview_faqs.answer: K.B. Institute of Pharmaceutical Education and Research is a reputed institute for Pharm.D, B.Pharma, M.Pharma Courses. Students can opt for these programs to pursue their career in Medicine & Health Sciences. The Institute has trained and experienced faculty members who deliver these programs. K.B. Institute of Pharmaceutical Education and Research has a review rating of 3.67 on the basis of Shiksha reviews by students. In addition to this, it has been rated 3.31 on Campus Life, 3.63 on Placements, 4.25 on Faculty and 3.31 on Infrastructure.

overview_faqs.question: What is the current fee structure for courses at K.B. Institute of Pharmaceutical Education and Research?
overview_faqs.answer: The fees structure for programs offerred by the K.B. Institute of Pharmaceutical Education and Research is INR 340000 - INR 1110000.

review_summary.college_name: K.B. Institute of Pharmaceutical Education and Research Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Doctor of Pharmacy (Pharm.D.) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: About my college, KBIPER Gandhinagar.

content.Placements: Placement opportunities are great. Well-known companies come to conduct interviews and select candidates with the best skills and knowledge. The average package received by students is about 2 LPA to 3 LPA. Around 10% to 15% of students get selected through campus placements. Top roles include medical writers, supervisors, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is mediocre. It is not a big campus but is provided with all facilities needed for a student. Labs are well-maintained, classrooms are great and accommodating, and the library is huge with a peaceful environment. Both AC and non-AC hostels are available, and the rooms are great and comfortable. The food provided is not that great.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: The college is average. Infrastructure was minimal, not extraordinary.

content.Placements: Package offered range from 11k to 30k. Top recruiting companies are Intas, Zydus, Linux laboratories, Cadilla, Sentiss, Alembic, West Coast, Mankind Pharma, Gsk, etc. Almost 70-80% students got internship with certification. Top roles offered are Medical Informant, Pharmacist, QA assistant, Medical representative, Assistant Manager, Drug manufacturing and many more.
content.Infrastructure: The labs were clean and professional and all the essentials were available. Not the extraordinarily high maintenance facilities, everything was average but overall good. Canteen wasn't good and food was below average. Sports and games like cricket, football, volleyball, basketball etc.

individual_reviews.course: Doctor of Pharmacy (Pharm.D.) - Batch of 2017
individual_reviews.title: Our college has good placement.

content.Placements: Good placements are available. Around 3.5 to 4 LPA salary packages are offered. College has signed more than 30 MOUs with different industries and organisations that will help the students to get good placements. Clinical trials and clinical pharmacists are the roles offered.
content.Infrastructure: Average facilities are available for infrastructure and hostel facilities. Classrooms are not that big. Laboratory has good facilities to perform the practicals. Wi-Fi is quite good. Library is small but has many reference books and textbooks to refer to.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with the college because of good faculty, placements, and value for money.

content.Placements: About 80% of students got placed in our course. The salary offered was between Rs.15000 - Rs.40000 per month. Torrent Pharmaceuticals, Cadila, Zydus, Sun Pharma, Intas, Torrent research center, Zydus research center, Indigene, GlaxoSmithKline, etc., visit our campus for placements. About 90% of students got internships from companies such as Zydus, Torrent, Cadila, Intas, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The college has good infrastructure and facilities. It includes Wi-Fi, labs, library, computer lab, classroom, hall, etc. It has good facilities in the hostel and the quality of food is very good. The college has medicinal facilities too. There is an indoor game area and a sports area which are good facilities for indoor and outdoor games.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: It provides good placements and infrastructure but campus life is not good.

content.Placements: Almost 50% of students were placed after college. Mostly the placements were on the lower side of the package, but some students also get a higher package which was exceptional. Zydus, Torrent pharma, etc., were the top recruiting companies.
content.Infrastructure: The Infrastructure was not good. The library staff was rude to students that students won't like to visit there often. Books can be issued for only 15 days and late charges were applicable. The quality of food in the mess was not up to the mark, and there were no medical facilities on campus.

reviews_list.batch_info: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: Learning place for your future.

review_content.Placements: As it is a dental college and looks after patients' oral health care, there won't be campus placements. After passing out, students have to look after themselves. Some can pursue higher education or can establish clinics or work in hospitals anything. All are required to do CRRI. Else they won't be allowed to practice and earn degree PG courses available in the same college and concession in fees provided to UG students who pursued their course here.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure under DCI norms. Moreover, the college is accredited with NAAC and ISO certifications. No Wi-Fi facilities. The places are tidy and well maintained. The hostel is too better. There would be a playground nearby and sports items available too. But you are not allowed to go out of the hostel after 6 pm. Palatable food.

reviews_list.batch_info: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: Relax about your future life.

review_content.Placements: The placement of students is almost full because, as it is dental school, our college trained us in a way that we will practice our own clinic. We completed our internship within one year within our campus premises, so we are well trained. The internship period is for house surgeons.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is good, and we have a great campus with a clean and neat environment. We have free Wi-Fi in the college and a hostel with fully equipped labs and a library. We have our own sports team, and we have won many intercollege events and secured top positions.

review_summary.college_name: Adhiparasakthi Dental College and Hospital Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: This is the best college in Tamil Nadu.

content.Placements: Around 100% of students are placed. Almost 100% of students get internships. They make their clinics, after MBBS, it is the best-offered course in medicine.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure and facilities are excellent in this college. It provides Wi-Fi, laboratories, lecture hall, library, auditorium, exam halls, canteen, etc. The facilities are good in the hostels. The mess is also clean, and there are archery and karate classes as well. Many sports events are conducted.
content.Faculty: Teachers are polite, helpful, qualified, knowledgeable, and interactive. They help students in all the ways they needed. They also motivate students, and they clear students' doubts. The semester exams are not easy.

individual_reviews.course: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: Learning place for your future.

content.Placements: As it is a dental college and looks after patients' oral health care, there won't be campus placements. After passing out, students have to look after themselves. Some can pursue higher education or can establish clinics or work in hospitals anything. All are required to do CRRI. Else they won't be allowed to practice and earn degree PG courses available in the same college and concession in fees provided to UG students who pursued their course here.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure under DCI norms. Moreover, the college is accredited with NAAC and ISO certifications. No Wi-Fi facilities. The places are tidy and well maintained. The hostel is too better. There would be a playground nearby and sports items available too. But you are not allowed to go out of the hostel after 6 pm. Palatable food.

individual_reviews.course: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Relax about your future life.

content.Placements: The placement of students is almost full because, as it is dental school, our college trained us in a way that we will practice our own clinic. We completed our internship within one year within our campus premises, so we are well trained. The internship period is for house surgeons.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is good, and we have a great campus with a clean and neat environment. We have free Wi-Fi in the college and a hostel with fully equipped labs and a library. We have our own sports team, and we have won many intercollege events and secured top positions.

individual_reviews.course: MDS in Orthodontics - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: My college is developing to keeping up with current tries we have all the equipments and materials.

content.Placements: 100% the highest - 65% the lowest -20% average -40% JMC coding and IAS training academy students has passed in those exam 20% of interns has been placed few are in work from home for 2 company and one full time job in Tidal park Chennai Professor and reader.
content.Infrastructure: 24/7 enabled study room and Wi-Fi for students Quality and quantity sufficient for students and staffs our library has journals and access pubmed journals to refer which s useful for students to collect articles for their presentation and ambulance facility always .

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Overall, I am satisfied with my college, although there are some short, such as language issues.

content.Placements: My batch 1st-year MBBS has a strength of 250 students. Most of my batchmates are day scholars or are from different districts of West Bengal. A few of us are from other states AIQ Bihar, Jharkhand, Chhattisgarh, Arunachal Pradesh, and Rajasthan. Every student gets an internship at the end of the MBBS course.
content.Infrastructure: Since my college was established in 1835, which makes it the oldest medical college in all of Asia, you can't expect that much better infrastructure compared to other newly established colleges. But, it still has its own historic vibe, and the patient load here is very high. Talking about other facilities, the library is well-maintained with free Wi-Fi facility and AC services. Labs are also highly equipped. Hostels are not up to the mark, as you have to share your room with at least two or three people, but some of the new hostels are very good.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: From all points of view, this college teaches us how to enjoy and study parallelly.

content.Placements: 45 percent were placed, with the highest package being 3-4 crore, the lowest between 10-15 lakh, and the average 20 lakh. 90 percent of students got internships from my course, and some work in the same college. Here, every student is very talented, and the faculty also helps us improve our skills, which helps in various fields.
content.Infrastructure: College infrastructure is very good. Free Wi-Fi is available in the library full day. The labs are okay for doing experiments. The classrooms are also good. A digital board is available. The library is also good for study Hostel is average as other hostels. The food quality is not so good in the mess. There is a ground in the hostel where every game is played: cricket, badminton, football, etc.

individual_reviews.title: Government Medical College, Kolkata is a good college.

content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good. The hostel is very neat and clean. There are separate hostels for boys and girls. There are many hostels. Maximum students get hostel facilities. Hostel facilities are good.
content.Faculty: A total of 9 semesters are taken in 4 years, and there are four professional examinations. Three exams are in the first year, two in the second year, and two in the third. As we all know, MBBS is not an easy course. So you have to work hard.
content.Other: To get a degree like this is to serve people. I would like to be a part of this noble profession. Here you can interact with others very easily. Above all, the senior-junior relationship is good here.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, I am satisfied with my college, although there are some short, such as language issues.
reviews.review_text: Since my college was established in 1835, which makes it the oldest medical college in all of Asia, you can't expect that much better infrastructure compared to other newly established colleges. But, it still has its own historic vibe, and the patient load here is very high. Talking about other facilities, the library is well-maintained with free Wi-Fi facility and AC services. Labs are also highly equipped. Hostels are not up to the mark, as you have to share your room with at least two or thre...

reviews.review_heading: From all points of view, this college teaches us how to enjoy and study parallelly.
reviews.review_text:
College infrastructure is very good. Free Wi-Fi is available in the library full day. The labs are okay for doing experiments. The classrooms are also good. A digital board is available. The library is also good for study
Hostel is average as other hostels. The food quality is not so good in the mess. There is a ground in the hostel where every game is played: cricket, badminton, football, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied, as it always produce great ranks in NEET PG.
reviews.review_text: The institution is renowned for its availability of many hostels. Most of the students get hostels to stay, and have a good life in the college. Hostels have Wi-Fi facilities. Hostel fees is also nominal. Good food quality at affordable price.

reviews.review_heading: An oldest Asian College.
reviews.review_text: The College has quite a good infrastructure. The classrooms or the lecture theatre are air conditioned with a microphone and projector. The Library has Wi-Fi connection and also the books are updated. The hostels are also quite good with all the required facilities available for the students.

reviews.review_heading: Government Medical College, Kolkata is a good college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good. The hostel is very neat and clean. There are separate hostels for boys and girls. There are many hostels. Maximum students get hostel facilities. Hostel facilities are good.

reviews.review_heading: This is the oldest heritage of Asia established in 1835 and it is the top medical college of Bengal.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. The campus is regularly cleaned. Our college has the largest gyanocologist ward all over Asia (Eden hospital). There are 4 boys hostels and 2 girls hostels for MBBS students. You will see the combination of ancient and modern technology in its infrastructure. But, there is no playground or a gym.

reviews.review_heading: It is the oldest medical college in Asia (est.1834).
reviews.review_text: We have an excellent library (9 am-6 pm) with an unlimited number of medical books. Labs for each department are ventilated well and have adequate resources to teach the students. The hostel mess is quite good (we get breakfast, lunch, evening snacks, and dinner) at a minimal price (Rs.35-60).

reviews.review_heading: MCK is the prime destination for MBBS.
reviews.review_text: Medical College Kolkata is India's first medical college. The rich heritage drives many talented minds every year to study medicine and surgery in our college from across India. Presently we have 2 lecture theatres and one is under construction. Teacher-student ratio is excellent. Labs are good. Library is air-conditioned. We have 5 boys and 1 girls hostel for undergraduate students. Canteen and mess is excellent too. As it is a medical college so you need not worry about your medical facilities...

reviews.review_heading: It is the oldest heritage in Asia.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are very high-tech. The labs are well-equipped. There is free Wi-Fi for students in the hostel. The library is full of books. It remains open from 9 a.m. to 6 p.m. Mess food is of good quality. They provide free medical facilities for students and their parents. Both indoor and outdoor sports are available.

reviews.review_heading: It is a perfect college if you want to enjoy your college life and excel in your studies.
reviews.review_text: As Asia's first medical institute, its infrastructures are a little worn, but I can promise you that the lecture halls have been well preserved. The library is quite impressive. Inside the academic building, Wi-Fi is also available. The labs are well-kept.

reviews.review_heading: It's a very good college, in one word.
reviews.review_text: Very good infrastructure, clean hostel.

reviews.review_heading: It is a very good place to become a doctor.
reviews.review_text: This is the top-ranked college in West Bengal so the facilities and the infrastructure availability are excellent. All the classrooms, libraries, and laboratories are well-equipped and modernized. The hostel is clean, and all the mess is open for all the students.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: At the UG and PG levels, North East Frontier Technical University offers a diverse range of progammes. Candidates can choose Full Time courses, from streams like Engineering, Medicine & Health Sciences and Business & Management Studies. review_content.Placements: Almost 55% of students got placed in our college. The highest salary package offered was 6 LPA. The average salary package offered was 3.5 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered was 2.5 LPA. Top recruiting companies were Capgemini, Cognizant, and DXC. About 12% of students got internships from Internshala. Top roles offered were programmer and analyst.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our labs were not well-maintained. Our library and classrooms were spacious. Hostels were average. The sports ground was good. The food served in the canteen was good.

review_content.Infrastructure: Labs, library are the main places we spend time in our free hours, the whole campus has free Wi-Fi network, hostel facilites are not good though wardens are strict and they usually makes argue with other state students northidian people are very bad in hostels they always ought with us.

reviews_list.review_title: Amazing place for students who want to make a successful career..

review_content.Placements: The college has a good and active placement cell. The fees is so low, and provide good quality education. I have joined B.Sc. in 2015. They provide a semester-based study programme. Professional courses are also available. According to me, it's a perfect university if you are interested in the Science field.
review_content.Infrastructure: All the facilities are available. The campus is fully covered by CCTV. Wi-Fi is available. The library is huge and the atmosphere is friendly. There is a canteen on the campus. The study room is well furnished and clean. The sitting arrangement is amazing. Everyone gets a private area to study without any disturbance.

content.Infrastructure: Labs, library are the main places we spend time in our free hours, the whole campus has free Wi-Fi network, hostel facilites are not good though wardens are strict and they usually makes argue with other state students northidian people are very bad in hostels they always ought with us.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. (Physics, Chemistry, Biology) - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: Amazing place for students who want to make a successful career..

content.Placements: The college has a good and active placement cell. The fees is so low, and provide good quality education. I have joined B.Sc. in 2015. They provide a semester-based study programme. Professional courses are also available. According to me, it's a perfect university if you are interested in the Science field.
content.Infrastructure: All the facilities are available. The campus is fully covered by CCTV. Wi-Fi is available. The library is huge and the atmosphere is friendly. There is a canteen on the campus. The study room is well furnished and clean. The sitting arrangement is amazing. Everyone gets a private area to study without any disturbance.

faqs.question: What documents are required for BCom admission at NEFTU?
faqs.answer: Documents usually include Class 10 and 12 mark sheets, a passport-size photo, valid ID proof, a transfer or migration certificate, and a caste certificate (if applicable). All documents must be uploaded as per the format mentioned on the NEFTU website during the BCom application.

faqs.question: Is BBA admission at NEFTU merit-based or entrance-based?
faqs.answer: BBA admission at North East Frontier Technical University is strictly merit-based. The university does not conduct an entrance exam. Selection is based only on the candidate's performance in Class 12 from a recognised board, preferably in the commerce stream

placement_report.college_name: North East Frontier Technical University Placement & Salary Insights

placement_data.title: NEFTU Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: North East Frontier Technical University has not released the official placement report for 2023. As per the data gathered from Shikshs students' reviews, almost 55% of students were placed in recent years. Further, the highest package and average package offered during NEFTU placements were INR 6 LPA and INR 3.50 LPA , respectively. Cognizant, Capgemini, DXC Technology, and many other renowned companies offered job opportunities.

tables.context: How is the placement at NEFTU?

faqs.question: How is the placement at NEFTU?
faqs.answer: The placement report or brochure is not out on the official website. As per the details gathered from unofficial sources, 55% of students get placed every year. The highest package and average package offered over the past few years were INR 6 LPA and INR 3.50 LPA, respectively. Check the complete insights of NEFTU placements from the table below: Particulars Placement Statistics the highest package INR 6 LPA Average package INR 3.50 LPA the lowest package INR 2.50 LPA Placement rate 55% NOTE: The above statistics are fetched from the Shiksha students' reviews.

faqs.question: What is the highest paying job in Tourism?
faqs.answer: Food and Beverage Director and General Manager of a premier international hotel chain hold highest earning position in Tourism industry. Food & Beverage Director is responsible for managing all parts of organization's food and beverage planning and service like - menu planning costing preparing and presenting food and beverages adhering to quality and safety requirements

faqs.question: What are some of the top recruiters hiring Electrical Engineers?
faqs.answer: Many top international companies having presence in India hire electrical engineers and offer them handsome salary packages . Some of the top recruiters are given here: Larson & Toubro Tata Electric Companies Sterling Schneider Electric Crompton Greaves Siemens Exide Industries Limited Mellcon Engineers

reviews.review_text: Our labs were not well-maintained. Our library and classrooms were spacious. Hostels were average. The sports ground was good. The food served in the canteen was good.

In the case of PG, students can get placement with an average salary package of 3 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is excellent and equipped with all basic facilities. There are several projector-equipped classrooms where 150 students can study together. reviews_list.review_title: A good choice for a medical college in Rajasthan.

review_content.Placements: You have to crack NEET UG first. There are no direct placements, but after one year of internship, you prepare for exams for medical officer, post-graduation, and many more. The internship is in a government college itself. It is a 4.5-year course with one year of internship.
review_content.Infrastructure: Study resources are good, but hostel facilities are not. There is no Wi-Fi facility. Labs are good, with sufficient equipment in good working condition. Medical facilities, along with sports and gaming facilities, are also good.

review_summary.college_name: Government Medical College, Pali Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: A newly established and better place for medical students.

content.Placements: There were no direct placements from college but almost all students who passed, got a reputed job in medical field in private and government sectors. After PG, most of the students got direct placement in private hospital. Students got placed. The average package was Rs 50,000 to Rs 1,00,000 per month.
content.Infrastructure: GMC Pali campus consisted of a 32 HCT college and a new hospital complex. College provided good facilities on campus. There were AC classrooms and spacious laboratories for practicals. This college was established in 2018. College had a library with full of books, magazines, and journals. There were separate hostels for boys and girls with single or double rooms. Sports and cultural activities named Deeptam were organised by college students.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely one of the best medical college in Rajasthan.

content.Placements: Actually, the course is MBBS. In this course, placements don't happen. You have to complete your MBBS followed by 1 year of internship, then an MBBS degree is given to you. Now you can do practice wherever you want, or you can set up your own clinic, or you can go for post-graduation.
content.Infrastructure: The college was built in 2018, so its infrastructure is so good, and its library is situated on the 3rd floor, and it is also huge. Wi-Fi and computer service is also provided here. There are 4 lecture theaters in which classes are generally held. Sports facilities are well here; almost all types of sports are there to grow in all aspects. There are two messes in the boys' hostel and the same with girls, so overall in academics, sports, and extracurricular activities, the college is top-notch.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: GMC Pali offers a balanced approach to medical education with personal growth. Students must visit.

content.Placements: The college does not provide direct placement after completing MBBS. After completing MBBS and MD, you can obtain placement through exams, but this facility is not provided by the college. In the case of PG, students can get placement with an average salary package of 3 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is excellent and equipped with all basic facilities. There are several projector-equipped classrooms where 150 students can study together. All types of modern laboratory facilities necessary for medical students are available. The campus includes the college, hostels, and all necessary facilities. There are separate hostels for boys and girls with two- and three-seater rooms. Excellent food quality.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: A good choice for a medical college in Rajasthan.

content.Placements: You have to crack NEET UG first. There are no direct placements, but after one year of internship, you prepare for exams for medical officer, post-graduation, and many more. The internship is in a government college itself. It is a 4.5-year course with one year of internship.
content.Infrastructure: Study resources are good, but hostel facilities are not. There is no Wi-Fi facility. Labs are good, with sufficient equipment in good working condition. The library contains a lot of books, and there is a reading zone also. The quality of food in the mess and canteen is good. Medical facilities, along with sports and gaming facilities, are also good.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied with the facilities, good campus, and faculty.

content.Placements: All five government medical colleges in Rajasthan were happy to admit me to their student list, but I chose GMC Pali just because of my personal preference. Internship is compulsory for all the students in the college and students can not practice medicine without getting their internship completion certificate from the university.
content.Infrastructure: The overall campus life is very good. All our senior batch is organizing events for college students and their juniors. The sports field on campus helps in socializing with other colleges, and the facilities of the classroom are very good, with a centralized AC speaker for better sound. Hostels are good and clean, rooms are specious, mess is good and very easily changeable food quality inspection are thoroughly done by faculties.

reviews.review_text: Study resources are good, but hostel facilities are not. There is no Wi-Fi facility. Labs are good, with sufficient equipment in good working condition. reviews.review_heading: Review of Government Medical College, Pali.
reviews.review_text: Our college was generally organized in 2018, and nowadays this college, time to time, the infrastructure is developed properly. But the facilities are good; all the work is done on time. The hostel is not good, but hostels are also under construction. But mess facilities are fine because the meal price is also not high; it is between 110-120 rupees late.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied facilities because of faculty and good professors.
reviews.review_text: Our college has an old building, and the infrastructure is alright, but it has a very good new academic block. The girls hostel is also old and not very good. But after we came here, new rooms were also given to us in the second year. So its kind of average in terms of infrastructure.

reviews.review_heading: We are  absolutely satisfied with facilities and good environment.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is not good but the facilities provided by college are good, like housekeeping is on time, washrooms are clean at time, but classrooms are not furnished. Hostel facilities are there. Only mess food is good but in boys hostel, bathrooms are not clean.

reviews.review_heading: All facilities are absolutely fine and good placements available .
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure are alright. Each department has its own sufficient faculty, and they teach well. Students also give good reviews to the teachers, and 90 percent of the hostel facilities are good. However, 10 percent is not good because the washrooms are not clean. The food quality is good, easily eatable, and there is a large sports ground available.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with the facilities and good placements available.
reviews.review_text: The environment of the college and hospital is good, the quality of the food is good, they also change the menu every week and hostels have 5 g of Wi-Fi available. Sports and medical facilities are excellent but the bathrooms are common in hostels for boys and in sports grounds, every game is played.

reviews.review_heading: All facilities are absolutely fine and good placements available .
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure of our college are good; we have top-notch amenities available such as 5G Wi-Fi, clean washrooms checked every hour, a 24-hour air-conditioned library stocked with all necessary books, good food in the mess, and a canteen available in the hostel. Additionally, we have a large sports ground.

reviews.review_heading: We have absolutely all good facilities.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure of our college are good, but the distance between the college and hospital is 3 to 4 kilometers. The college provides buses for students who go for posting, internship practice and classrooms that are well furnished. The hostel facilities are good, but the food is tasteless. The menu also changes weekly and we have a large sports field.

reviews.review_heading: We have all the facilities here.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure of our college are good but the hospital is 3 to 4 kilometers from a college building. The college provides buses for students who are gone in posting and there is a large library available where all the needed books are available. Hostel facilities are good, they provide coolers, but the food is tasteless and a sports ground is available in which tournaments are held.

reviews.review_heading: We are absolutely satisfied with the facilities and good placements.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure of our college are good but washrooms are not good, classrooms are fully furnished and year-by-year development is done by the college. The hostel facilities are also good like the canteen that is available in the hostel, mess food that is good sometimes, but sometimes it is tasteless and sometimes the menu is also repeated. We also have a large sports field.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of faculty.
reviews.review_text: The college have Wi-Fi but only faculty has used this Wi-Fi it is not for students and sports and medical facilities are excellent. Hostel rooms are good but bathroom is not attached with bathroom boys have common bathroom and washrooms, the quality of mess food is good, the environment of the hostel is excellent, Wi-Fi is available in hostel .

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, you can get admission in Kerala Veterinary & Animal Sciences University with 70% in graduation.The eligibility criteria for admission to the MVSc programme at Kerala Veterinary and Animal Sciences University is a Bachelor's degree in Veterinary Science and Animal Husbandry recognised by the University with an OGPA of 6.0/10 or equivalent OGPA/equivalent percentage of 50% marks in traditional system. For SC/ST candidates, the OGPA shall be 5.5/10 or equivalent. For admission to the BVSc & AH degree course, a candidate should have passed the 10+2 or equivalent examination with Physics, Chemistry, Biology, and English with a minimum of 50% marks secured from a recognised board of the country. They should have also cleared All India Pre-Veterinary Test (AIPVT) or some state-specific veterinary test.
faqs.question: Can I get into Kerala Veterinary & Animal Sciences University with 70% in graduation?

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, the Indian Council of Agricultural Research (ICAR) conducts the All India Entrance Examination for Admission (AIEEA) to offer admission to undergraduate and postgraduate courses in agriculture and allied sciences, including veterinary science. The ICAR score is relevant for admission to the M.V.Sc. course at Kerala Veterinary and Animal Sciences University. 25% of the seats in each department are reserved for ICAR applicants who pass the admission exam.
faqs.question: Is ICAR required for Kerala Veterinary & Animal Sciences University?

faqs.answer: A:    The All India Entrance Examination for Admission (AIEEA) is administered by the Indian Council of Agricultural Research (ICAR) to provide admission to undergraduate and postgraduate degrees in agriculture and associated fields, including veterinary science. The ICAR score is required for admission to Kerala Veterinary and Animal Sciences University's M.V.Sc. program. 25% of the seats in each department are reserved for ICAR applicants who pass the admission exam.

review_content.Placements: The BVSC and AH course allows you to achieve your goal to become a doctor and this college is well-equipped to mould us to become the best doctors. I am sure that None of you will be jobless after the course, as the importance of a veterinarian is increasing day by day in our world.
review_content.Infrastructure: The classrooms are smart classrooms and good-quality lectures are offered by most of the professors. The library in the college is enough to cover all the doubts during the syllabus. The hostel is running under students' and mess which means we can suggest the food and good quality food is provided. The college has experienced physical education professors and is well-equipped with materials needed for sports and games.

reviews_list.review_title: I am dissatified because basic needs are not available in this college.

review_content.Placements: Students are selected under the KEAM entrance exam in companies like Milma, Nestle, Amul, etc. Other milk and food companies provide job opportunities. We don't have any internship program in our college. They do not provide any job requirements. Dairy extension officer is the top role.
review_content.Infrastructure: It is a small college with no basic facilities. Hostels are available but the mess is not available. Lab, library, and classrooms are available. Rooms are small, but they are improving. Wi-Fi and other facilities are only for office use. Hostel is very congested. Classrooms are very small.

Sc programmes. The admission examination, interview, and counselling are used to determine who gets into the B.Sc. programmes. A combination of the entrance exam and interview determines admission to the M.V.Sc. programme. KVASU provides programmes at the undergraduate, graduate, and doctorate levels. The Veterinary Council of India (VCI) and the Commissioner of Entrance Examinations of Kerala (CEE) oversee the NEET-UG test. Admission, classes, costs, and placements at KVASU Wayanad

review_summary.college_name: KVASU Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Veterinary Science and Animal Husbandry (B.V.Sc. & A.H) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: The best things in my life began with this college. Forever grateful.

content.Placements: The most important course taught here is veterinary science and animal husbandry. This is a 5-year course curriculum, including an internship. Every year, almost 125 students are admitted to the college for UG. The admission procedure is based on the entrance ranking.
content.Infrastructure: The college provides us with a large campus and beautiful areas covered with trees and scenery. There is a good playground where students can play football, cricket and other sports. There is a good library for students to refer to for their doubts. Wi-Fi is available in every hostel and also inside the college; it's password-protected. Food is available near the hostel mess for which additional fees should be paid.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Dairy Technology - Batch of 0
individual_reviews.title: College has a good infrastructure, but I am slightly dissatisfied with the placements.

content.Placements: Placement cell is very less active in our college. Only 10% of the total batch got placed. The top company visiting for placements was Amul. They only offered the roles in sales and marketing department. All the students got internships in different companies.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are smart having Wi-Fi connections in both college and the hostel. Labs have good facilities with highly sophisticated equipments. Food available in the mess and the canteen is of good quality. Gym, sports and games are highly appreciated. Multiple clinics are located nearby.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Veterinary Science and Animal Husbandry (B.V.Sc. & A.H) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Good infrastructure and good placements.

content.Placements: The BVSC and AH course allows you to achieve your goal to become a doctor and this college is well-equipped to mould us to become the best doctors. I am sure that None of you will be jobless after the course, as the importance of a veterinarian is increasing day by day in our world.
content.Infrastructure: The classrooms are smart classrooms and good-quality lectures are offered by most of the professors. The library in the college is enough to cover all the doubts during the syllabus. The hostel is running under students' and mess which means we can suggest the food and good quality food is provided. The college has experienced physical education professors and is well-equipped with materials needed for sports and games.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Dairy Technology - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: I am dissatified because basic needs are not available in this college.

content.Placements: Students are selected under the KEAM entrance exam in companies like Milma, Nestle, Amul, etc. Other milk and food companies provide job opportunities. We don't have any internship program in our college. They do not provide any job requirements. Dairy extension officer is the top role.
content.Infrastructure: It is a small college with no basic facilities. Hostels are available but the mess is not available. Lab, library, and classrooms are available. Rooms are small, but they are improving. Wi-Fi and other facilities are only for office use. Hostel is very congested. Classrooms are very small.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Dairy Technology - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: It is a good college for studies but not in terms of placements.

content.Placements: Almost 50% of the students got placed. The highest salary package offered was 5 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered was 1.8 LPA. The top recruiting companies of our college were Amarai, Milky Mist, Milma, etc. Roles offered were technical superintendent, quality analyst, etc. About 10% of the students got internships, and internships are mandatory here.
content.Infrastructure: The college has a good infrastructure, and there were almost all labs like microbiology, computer lab, chemistry and technology labs. Classrooms were neat and clean. One of the main attractive things in our college is its good library, which has books that help students to learn better. There were separate hostels for both boys and girls, and the food available at the hostel has good quality. The college also gives importance to sports.

faqs.question: Who can apply for admission at KVASU?
faqs.answer: Kerala Veterinary and Animal Sciences University offers ten courses in various disciplines of Veterinary and Animal Sciences. Find below the list of courses offered in the University with their eligibility criteria:CoursesCommon EligibilityBTechClass 12 with 45-50 % aggregateMTechClass 12 with 60% aggregateBVSCClass 12 with 50%MScBachelor's Degree with 60% aggregateMVSCBachelor's Degree with 60% aggregate

faqs.question: Does Kerala Veterinary & Animal Sciences University accept AIEEA for BTech?
faqs.answer: Yes, Kerala Veterinary and Animal Sciences University (KVASU) accepts AIEEA-UG for admission to its B.Tech. in Dairy Technology program. The admission to the B.Tech. (Dairy Technology) course is regulated by the Commissioner for Entrance Examinations of Kerala (CEE) through Kerala Engineering Entrance Exam (KEAM) and ICAR through the AIEEA-UG entrance examination. Candidates who have passed Higher Secondary Examination, Kerala, or Examinations recognised as equivalent thereto, with Physics and Mathematics as compulsory subjects and Chemistry as one of the optional subject with at least 45% marks put together in the above subjects are eligible for admission.

faqs.question: What is the ICAR score for B.Sc Kerala Veterinary & Animal Sciences University?
faqs.answer: The All India Entrance Examination for Admission (AIEEA) is administered by the Indian Council of Agricultural Research (ICAR) to provide admission to undergraduate and postgraduate degrees in agriculture and associated fields, including veterinary science. The ICAR score is required for admission to Kerala Veterinary and Animal Sciences University's M.V.Sc. program. 25% of the seats in each department are reserved for ICAR applicants who pass the admission exam.

content.Placements: The MBBS batch size here is 200 students. Every student signs a bond of rural service for 2 years, so every student does get a job for at least 2 years. After that, it is upon the student's talent. You can either go for higher studies or apply to various hospitals for work.
content.Infrastructure: Labs are good and functioning. Classrooms are very spacious. Library is also decent and has AC. The boys' hostel is decent, and the girls' hostel is pretty good. Mess food is good, it's nowhere close to the food you eat at home but still good enough.

description: CCM MC Raipur cutoff 2025 is available on this page for various accepting exams. Candidates can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the cutoff details across different rounds and categories. Other important updates are as follows:

CCM MC Raipur NEET UG cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final seat allotment result for admission to the MBBS course. The cutoff was released for several categories belonging to the AI quota. For the General AI quota, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 22435 for MBBS admission. Candidates can refer to the table below to view the first and last round cutoffs 2025 for the General AI category students.

CCM MC Raipur MBBS cutoff 2025 was 22435 for the students belonging to the General AI quota. Similarly, for the OBC category students, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 22943 for admission to the MBBS course. Comparing both categories, the cutoff rank was more competitive for the General category students as compared to the OBC category for MBBS admission. For other categories and rounds, use the provided filters.

Candidates preparing for admission can refer to the table below to view or download the NEET UG round and year-wise consolidated cutoff list. This will help students to understand the past three years' cutoff trends.

placements.overview:
UG Degree (4 year) : In year 2017-18, for 4 year UG Degree, a total of 100 students were admitted at Sandip Institute of Pharmaceutical Sciences (SIPS) and 100 completed their graduation in 2020-21. Out of 100 students 59 were placed with median salary of INR 230000 and 41 students opted for higher studies. A total of 100 students were admitted in year 2018-19 for 4 year UG degree at Sandip Institute of Pharmaceutical Sciences (SIPS)and 110 completed their graduation in 2021-22. Out of 110 students 91 were placed with median salary of INR 336000 and 19 students opted for higher studies.

PG Degree (2 year) : In year 2019-20, for 2 year PG Degree, a total of 30 students were admitted at Sandip Institute of Pharmaceutical Sciences (SIPS) and 30 completed their graduation in 2020-21. Out of 30 students 25 were placed with median salary of INR 225000. A total of 31 students were admitted in year 2020-21 for 2 year PG degree at Sandip Institute of Pharmaceutical Sciences (SIPS)and 31 completed their graduation in 2021-22. Out of 31 students 28 were placed with median salary of INR 260000 and 2 students opted for higher studies.

faqs.answer: Sandip Institute of Pharmaceutical Sciences (SIPS) has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.PharmaCandidate must have studied Physics and Chemistry as compulsory subjects along with one of the Mathematics/Biology subjects with above mentioned marks in the above subjects taken together from any recognised Board/Council. The mentioned marks of SC/ST and OBC is for the candidate belonging to maharashtra State. Candidates who are appearing at the qualifying examination are also eligible. Maharashtra State candidates must have to appear for MHTCET. All India Candidates need to appear for MHTCET/NEET. However, preference shall be given to the candidate obtaining non zero positive score in NEET over the candidates who obtained non zero score in MHTCET.D.PharmaCandidate passed 10+2 (science stream) with Physics, Chemistry and Biology or Mathematics or Any other qualification approved by the Pharmacy Council of India from any recognised institute/board are eligible to applyM.PharmaFor sponsored candidates, minimum of two years of fulltime work experience in a registered firm/ company/industry/ educational and/ or research institute/ any Government Department or Government Autonomous Organization in the relevant field in which admission is being sought.

content.Infrastructure: College provides various facilities to the students that help in their studies. The food available is also good which makes easy access in college. Everything is available at a low price in the college.
content.Faculty: Faculty members of the college are good which makes it better for their studies. Semester exams are taken in 6 months and the unit tests are also conducted in the college. 90% of students will get pass in college.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with the faculty members. It provided average placements in 2023.

content.Placements: Students should secure at least 65% in academics to get placed. Companies choose students based on their marks. The highest package in the college is 3.5 LPA. The lowest package is 2 LPA. The top recruiting companies like Glenmark, Sun Pharma, and Cipla visit the college to hire students from our course. Only 50% of students got internships.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities are well provided like a library, labs, Wi-Fi, and digital classrooms. The hostel fee is too high to stay. Mess food is not that good. Sports facilities are there in the college. A gym is also available, and sports grounds are well-maintained. The canteen food is not good.

faqs.question: How can I get into Sandip Institute of Pharmaceutical Sciences (SIPS) for UG/PG courses? Am I eligible for admission?
faqs.answer:
Sandip Institute of Pharmaceutical Sciences (SIPS) has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:CoursesEligibilityB.PharmaCandidate must have studied Physics and Chemistry as compulsory subjects along with one of the Mathematics/Biology subjects with above mentioned marks in the above subjects taken together from any recognised Board/Council.
The mentioned marks of SC/ST and OBC is for the candidate belonging to maharashtra State.
Candidates who are appearing at the qualifying examination are also eligible.
Maharashtra State candidates must have to appear for MHTCET. All India Candidates need to appear for MHTCET/NEET. However, preference shall be given to the candidate obtaining non zero positive score in NEET over the candidates who obtained non zero score in MHTCET.D.PharmaCandidate passed 10+2 (science stream) with Physics, Chemistry and Biology or Mathematics or Any other qualification approved by the Pharmacy Council of India from any recognised institute/boar

reviews.review_heading: Perfect college because of faculty members, infrastructure, etc.
reviews.review_text: Good-quality labs, classrooms, and library are available. They also have Wi-Fi facility on campus. Large classrooms and separate labs for different departments are available. Cleanliness is maintained by the staff and students. Good-quality security and canteen facilities are available with good food.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Sandip Institute of Pharmaceutical Sciences.
reviews.review_text: In the Sandip Institute of Pharmaceutical Sciences, very high-quality infrastructure and facilities are available college. Wi-Fi is available in library with proper internet speed. There are high-quality labs with proper instruments and chemical. Classrooms with digital projector and LED TV.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Campus is full of joy with good infrastructure, well-equipped laboratory, and classrooms. Library is available for study purposes. Wi-Fi are available. Hostel is provided by college in campus area. Rooms are nice for study with high internet speed Wi-Fi.

reviews.review_heading: The college is good in terms of various facilities and events are also done at the college.
reviews.review_text: College provides various facilities to the students that help in their studies. The food available is also good which makes easy access in college. Everything is available at a low price in the college.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the faculty members. It provided average placements in 2023.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are well provided like a library, labs, Wi-Fi, and digital classrooms. The hostel fee is too high to stay. Mess food is not that good. Sports facilities are there in the college. A gym is also available, and sports grounds are well-maintained. The canteen food is not good.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely happy and satisfied because of good placements, faculty, facilities, campus, and course.
reviews.review_text: Our department provides high-connectivity Wi-Fi to the students during college hours for free. Classrooms are very neat and clean and are cleaned every day and also mopped. Classrooms are constructed with shiny and well-painted walls. Benches are clean and sufficient. Projectors and smart TVs are there in every classroom. The library is the best and a very peaceful place for us to study. The library has every book we need and also provides us with books on time. Computers are there in the librar...

reviews.review_heading: Not satisfied with the college placement in 2023.
reviews.review_text: The campus has infrastructure; there is a bullseye in front of the main building. Two sports grounds that offer intercollegiate sports activities are organized. The campus is well maintained and provides a good canteen and hostel. In labs, all chemical and pharmaceutical machines are available for experiments; there is no internet. Mess food is of average quality. For medical purposes, we have separate rooms for injured students.

reviews.review_heading: Cipla and Mankind came to recruit students.
reviews.review_text: Our college has well established infrastructure with suitable labs and required instruments for each subject. The college has Wi-Fi throughout the campus and also well maintained library. The hostel facility is also good offering all required needs.

reviews.review_heading: The college needs to improve its faculty.
reviews.review_text: Our college is in the list of colleges with great infrastructure and campus. It has NAAC accreditation of B grade. The hostel facility is pretty good but is expensive. However, the hostel offers all the required facilities and is wroth the money paid. I was a hosteller and had an amazing experience.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the college and extracurricular activities are the best.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms, library, and practical labs are good. They are always neat and clean, with all suitable facilities (labs with all the equipment). The campus doesn't have free Wi-Fi. Hostels are very good and well managed.

reviews.review_heading: SIPS is an outstanding pharmaceutical college.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure of the college are very good. We have excellent lab facilities. The canteen food is good and healthy. The nature balance with infrastructure is very good. Hostel facilities are always clean and neat. Everywhere security guards are appointed.

reviews.review_heading: It's really a good college in terms of education and placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is the best. We have high-speed Wi-Fi in our college. The classrooms and library are well-maintained. Hostel facilities are good for students and teachers. The college canteens are the best in providing food.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it is the best college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is awesome. All classrooms and labs are well designed. It has a clean and tidy campus. Wi-Fi facility is also there for net surfing. The canteen is also well-maintained with good food which is changed on a daily interval. Care is taken for all vegetarian and non-vegetarian students. The hostel is fully controlled by the staff members.

reviews.review_heading: The college has excellent infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: SIPS has excellent hostel infrastructure and all modern facilities. The college does have a huge library with over 5,000+ books and journals. The college has overall 7 huge canteens with a capacity of 250 students at a time. But the canteen somehow lacks sanitary condition.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Sandip Institute of Pharmaceutical Sciences (SIPS).
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of this college seems to best in Nashik. All classrooms are equipped with projectors so that they can have PowerPoint presentations as an ICT tool for better knowledge of topics. Laboratories are tidy and well-maintained by the college. Hostel students are provided with an internet facility for their devices. The ground is so huge that every special program like Sandipotsav, any sports like cricket, football and volleyball are played well. The food and canteen facilities are t...

individual_reviews.course: Doctor of Pharmacy (Pharm.D.) - Batch of 2030
individual_reviews.title: The infrastructure is good. It has supportive faculty members.

content.Placements: Students get an internship in the Doctor of Pharmacy course as the college provides good hospital practice with 100 percent effort. The course has 1 year of internship in the hospital with a low amount of funds. The placement percentage of this course is average.
content.Infrastructure: The college building is of 3 floors, which have spacious corridors. Classrooms are clean, hygienic, and spacious. The college provides good Wi-Fi. The college has a good library that has interesting articles and journals. The college is attached to the canteen, which provides stationery items.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: A college with many memories.

content.Placements: We are 2022 batch students studying the 4th year of B.Pharma. Our college does not provide any placements. Students should attend interviews to get jobs. The average salary package offered to our seniors is 2.5 LPA. Almost 90% of students got internships from our college in industries. Students secured their jobs in different pharmaceutical industries. Roles offered are research assistant and quality assurance manager.
content.Infrastructure: Our college is well-known for its infrastructure and greenery. It is large. The campus is spread over 300 acres of land. There are 2 engineering, degree, MBA, and polytechnic colleges. Wi-Fi is accessible throughout the campuses. Labs are well-maintained and spacious. We have very vast 2 cricket grounds, a football court, a basketball court, and 8 shuttle courts. A sports meet is held every 3 months. Our college library is very small. There is a central library for all colleges, which is very vast.

content.Infrastructure: 1. A Wi-Fi facility is there in our college. 2. Labs are well-equipped with various chemical and facilities. 3. Classrooms are good and neat with basic requirements like benches and fans. 4. The library is well-equipped with books. 5. The hostel facility is there.

individual_reviews.title: It is an average college.

The hostel is above average. The library is very small and does not contain many books. The lab does not have all the equipment.
content.Faculty: Exams are good. Semester exams are very difficult. Teachers are not good. Some are good. They will not provide any notes.

individual_reviews.course: M.Pharma. in pharmaceutical Analysis - Batch of 2015
individual_reviews.title: It is a great college with experienced faculty, good ambiance, and infrastructure.

content.Placements: Most of the students got placed in top MNC companies soon after completing the course. Most of our batchmates were placed in the quality control and quality assurance department in the best pharma company with a minimum salary package offered is 3 LPA. Even some of my batchmates were placed as marketing associates like medical representatives.
content.Infrastructure: All required and the latest infrastructure were available in the college. Specified labs for every department furnished with the latest equipment to get practical knowledge. Spacious playground with shuttle court and stages for conducting cultural activities. We had a full-fledged library and availability of canteen for all 365 days.

4. The library is well-equipped with books. 
5. The hostel facility is there.

reviews.review_heading: It is an average college.
reviews.review_text: The hostel rooms and facilities are very good. The food served in the hostel is not good. Water services are good. Cold water is available in our college. The hostel is above average. The library is very small and does not contain many books. The lab does not have all the equipment.

reviews.review_heading: It is a great college with experienced faculty, good ambiance, and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: All required and the latest infrastructure were available in the college. Specified labs for every department furnished with the latest equipment to get practical knowledge. Spacious playground with shuttle court and stages for conducting cultural activities. We had a full-fledged library and availability of canteen for all 365 days.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with faculty members, good placements for our seniors and good facilities.
reviews.review_text: Our campus was better in providing facilities because our campus has more space to move, playgrounds, etc. Wi-Fi is available on every campus. Labs are maintained very neatly, and classrooms are better. The library was good.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good infrastructure and good surroundings.
reviews.review_text: Our college surroundings are green, pleasant, elaborate, and fresh. It has good Wi-Fi, good equipments in labs, digital classrooms, and all references in the library. The hostel food is good, but the fee is too expensive.

reviews.review_heading: Not much satisfied about placements but all other facilities are good.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi will be there but not working. Food is not much good. Canteens are not bad. Medical facilities are not there No sports. No sports events has been conducted till now for hostlers.

review_content.General: Facilities with regard to infrastructure are ample. Labs are well-equipped with all the basic instruments to a large no of instruments for help Library has adequate no of seats and Wi-Fi facility along with a good environment. All the course related books are available. Along with it they provide Prepladder tabs for Online NEET PG coaching in the library premises area. Hostel rooms has adequate space and attached washrooms that are great. Wi-Fi is present in Hostel but of no significant use to students as we have a limited access. Ground is good and has ample sports activities like football cricket basketball Tennis etc. Adequate medical facilities are their as their is an attached medical hospital to the college. Hostel food is slightly on average side and students have to some times feel some difficulties. Overall infrastructure and hostel premises are well-equipped and welfurnished and are good compared to an average college.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Review of PK DAS Institute of Medical Sciences - Hospital and Medical College.

review_content.Placements: Our batch contains 150 students. Many study packages have come forward to our college but now our class strength is reducing as the year goes our college offers placement. I don't know more about placement since I am 2nd year only, but I heard everyone saying about it.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college and hostel infrastructure is so good. Classrooms are with air-conditioner. Moreover, the library is also there, the lab is also present. The hostel is so good separate rooms are available for each. The mess is common for all. There is a triple sharing room as well as a single sharing room.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: PK DAS Institute of Medical Sciences has good infrastructure with a decent campus life.

review_content.Placements: In the current scenario, most of the pass-out students join the same hospital for their internship of one year with a pay scale of around 15,000 to 20,000 per month. After the internships around 10 to 20 students get the opportunity to work in nearby hospitals like Valluvanad hospital and Ashwini hospital thrissur.
review_content.Infrastructure: There are four air-conditioned lecture halls on the campus along with a dissection hall, central library, external library, hematology lab, histology lab, amphibian lab, microbiology lab, and pharmacology lab for the pre and para-clinical subjects. The hostel rooms are three sharing with attached bathrooms, an indoor recreational room, a reading room, a badminton court, and an outdoor ground. Hot water is not available. The campus premises also has a garden and a basketball court.

individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied because of everything.

content.Placements: Almost 80% of the students of our class got placed in our course. The highest salary package offered was 15 LPA, the lowest salary package offered was 7 LPA, and the average salary package offered was about 10-13 LPA. Almost 90% of the students got internships from our course in India's top rating hospitals. The top role offered in our course was a surgeon.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is best as compared to other colleges. It has proper facilities including a library with all kinds of books and journals. The college also provides Wi-Fi facilities for students, which is helpful in attending online classes. Classrooms are well-built and furnished. The quality of food and other facilities is the best.

reviews_list.batch_info: BHMS - Bachelor of Homeopathic Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: I had an amazing experience with teachers, and they were very knowledgeable.

review_content.Placements: In BHMS, you could earn money through your own practice. At our college, it was an amazing experience with fun and study. It was free with study, and after completing BHMS, you got an internship as a part of your degree, which was helpful for the future. That experience made you more perfect.
review_content.Infrastructure: As it was a homeopathic medical college. It had a well-developed infrastructure with lab facilities. It had enough classrooms and a library. Books were available in the library, not just those containing the course syllabus. But also many more books that were useful for learning homeopathy.

reviews_list.batch_info: BHMS - Bachelor of Homeopathic Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2017
reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied with education and personality development.

review_content.Placements: Our college did not provide good placements. We need to build our clinics or find positions for ourselves. Through our skills, we can contribute to society and gather their attraction towards us. During your internship, you will have the option to go to the Bank of Baroda for practice and to experience independent living.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college provided good infrastructure. A girls' hostel was available. For boys, there were plenty of PGs in nearby areas, so it was quite good.
review_content.Faculty: Our teachers were good. They were friendly and well-educated. They emphasized practical and theoretical knowledge, teaching the holistic art of healing, which was crucial for medical practitioners. However, it's up to us to observe and learn from them based on our perspective.

content.Infrastructure: Our college provided good infrastructure. A girls' hostel was available. For boys, there were plenty of PGs in nearby areas, so it was quite good.
content.Faculty: Our teachers were good. They were friendly and well-educated. They emphasized practical and theoretical knowledge, teaching the holistic art of healing, which was crucial for medical practitioners. However, it's up to us to observe and learn from them based on our perspective.

content.Placements: In our course, approximately 125 students are admitted every year. Students apply for a bachelor's degree in homeopathic medicine and surgery after completing 12th grade. This course is appropriate for those who want to become doctors.
content.Infrastructure: In 1970, Gujarat Homoeopathic Medical College and Hospital was established. Our college buildings are average. Girls' hostel is under the college management. The college building has 3 floors, with a hospital on the ground floor and a college on the other two floors.

review_content.Placements: 90% of students are placed in my course. The highest package is 42,000 rupees per month, the average package is 20,000 rupees per month, and the lowest is 12,000 rupees per month. Wood PLC, L&T, and HL Mando are the companies that came to our college and hired students.
review_content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are cool. There is only a girls' hostel, not a boys' hostel, on the college campus. The canteen is good, and the mess is beautiful. Sports tournaments are held there. The infrastructure of our college is great, beautiful, and the playground is not so big but is neat and clean, and students play there.

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Electronics and Telecommunication Engineering - Batch of 2022

review_content.Placements: In 2022, at least 40 to 50 percent of students got placed. The highest package was 4.5 lakh annually, and the lowest was 1.8 lakh annually. review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is not very good, that's for sure. Most buildings are old, except one. There is no free Wi-Fi, and the library is terrible. individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Electronics and Telecommunication Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied & happy with this faculty, good placement record, Science 2012, good environment.

content.Placements: Almost every student is placed in a company but a few students do not accept this and are going on to higher studies. Top companies are Siemens L&T Tata Voltas and Havells. The highest package is almost Rs. 30,000 per month (Mechanical) and the minimum is Rs. 19,000 per month.
content.Infrastructure: The laboratories are among the best compared to other government colleges offering well maintained equipment and a strong practical learning environment. Classrooms are clean well ventilated and conducive to focused study. Wi Fi facilities are available on campus; however access is currently restricted to staff members. The canteen provides decent food at affordable prices catering to the daily needs of students. Hostel facilities are available exclusively for girls ensuring safety and a comfortable living environment. Overall the campus maintains a clean and disciplined atmosphere focused on academic development rather than extravagance.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Electronics and Telecommunication Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: It is a good college with good placements.

content.Placements: Moderate placement record with a mix of both positive and negative experiences reported by students. Some students have reported successful placements in reputable companies like L&T, Capgemini, and John Deere, with average salaries of around Rs. 10,000 to Rs. 15,000 per month. However, other reviews indicate that placements can be inconsistent, with some students facing difficulties in securing jobs and lower salary packages.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good. Classrooms are good & big and clean. The library is pretty good. Generally positive infrastructure review, with features like well-equipped labs, classrooms, and a library. While the college offers a girls' hostel, some reviews suggest a need for a boys' hostel to accommodate students from outside the city. Overall, the college is considered to have good facilities and a healthy learning environment.

reviews.review_heading: It has good circumstances, quality education and good facilities.
reviews.review_text: Every year our college should conduct sports annually. The food served in the canteen is good.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college for students who have a small budget.
reviews.review_text: We have facilities like labs, classrooms, practicals, Wi-Fi, and a library. There is no hostel facility available for boys but girls do have the hostel facility.
